# Atherstone Digital

Atherstone Digital is a fractional ecommerce director service for Shopify brands doing £500k–£5M in annual revenue, based in Warwickshire, UK. Founded and run by Dan Le Gresley (15+ years scaling Shopify brands, former Head of Ecommerce at a UK £50M retailer). The service replaces fragmented agency rosters with one senior operator backed by a stack of AI agents handling catalogue, content, and reporting work. Retainers from £3,000/month. Maximum three partners at a time.

Primary services: Shopify store builds, CRO, paid media, n8n automation, feed optimisation, lifecycle marketing, LLM search readiness, catalogue health, technical development.

Contact: info@atherstonedigital.com
Book: https://calendly.com/dan-atherstonedigital/30min
